case_title: ARHONDOPOULOS, DIMITRIOS VS FUTURE PAGING & CELLULAR INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ARHONDOPOULOS, DIMITRIOS AS TO DEFENDANT FUTURE PAGING & CELLULAR INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARHONDOPOULOS, DIMITRIOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FUTURE PAGING & CELLULAR INC. THE CONTRACT BET. PLFT & DEFT IS RESCINDED. PLFT TO RETURN ALL EQUIPMENT TO DEFT BY 2/12/99 AT 5PM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
